raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies and resolves internal contradictions, sharpens the contribution, and aligns empirical claims with the rest of the text.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., router-only vs. advisor-only decomposition), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced (e.g., changes to the abstract/intro), but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies and resolves internal contradictions, sharpens the contribution, and aligns empirical claims with the rest of the text.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., router-only vs. advisor-only decomposition), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced (e.g., changes to the abstract/intro), but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
